name: RTB House
description: Deep-learning retargeting DSP for e-commerce and app advertisers with personalized programmatic campaigns.

seo.title: RTB House — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: RTB House: Deep-learning retargeting DSP for e-commerce and app advertisers with personalized programmatic campaigns.

when_to_use: Deep-learning retargeting for e-commerce cart abandonment
Personalized programmatic campaigns for mobile app advertisers
CPA-optimized retargeting for fashion and retail apps

pros: Deep-learning models with real research backing
cons: Best results require large catalog feeds
review.verdict: Excellent retargeting DSP for commerce, less of a fit for pure gaming app UA.
review.best_for: Ecommerce apps with product catalogs seeking dynamic retargeting at scale.
review.not_for: Gaming or non-commerce apps without catalog feeds to power dynamic creatives.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
